title: Digital World Additions
description: ABANDONED - This project is merging into The Digimod itself!
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

This is an addon for The Digimod - If you don't have that mod installed, this one won't work at all!

 

This addon adds models, textures and spawns for Digimon that are not yet in game but will be in the future. All the models and textures were provided by the people over at The Digimod's Discord server.

 

All you need to do is simply put this mod in the mods folder and that's it. No extra steps requiered. The installing process is the exact same as any other regular mod. The only extra requierement is that you need The Digimod installed aswell.
